comment: pathloss_tx<i>.npy is PL in dB; received power = eirp_dbm - PL. Wall crossings count contiguous material runs once; furniture attenuates per meter of path. n=2 (free space) because walls are charged explicitly -- raising n as well double-counts. 2D model: no reflections/diffraction/corridor waveguiding, so deep multi-wall shadows are pessimistic; no floor/ceiling paths.
